name: Orvana Minerals Corp.
description: Orvana Minerals Corp. is a multi-mine producer engaged in the evaluation, development, and mining of precious and base metal deposits, primarily gold, copper, and silver. The company operates the El Valle gold-copper-silver mines in northern Spain and the Don Mario Mine in Bolivia. With a focus on ethical and responsible practices, Orvana strives to deliver value to its stakeholders and contribute to the sustainable development of the communities in which it operates, while working to optimize its operations and realize organic growth through exploration within and in proximity to its existing units.
